summary.intent: Perform an automated CEO/founder-mode review of the CHA-16 PR implementing crm.contacts.* RPC methods, then post the review to Linear.
summary.outcome: Full review completed and written to plans/2026-03-17-ceo-review-crm-contacts-rpc.md; all 28 CRM tests confirmed passing; Linear comment posted with SHIP IT verdict after resolving API auth issues.

repo: The store layer (list_filtered, get_by_external, get_with_channels) was already fully implemented — the PR is purely wiring through service trait and RPC handler with zero new persistence code.
CRM crates compile independently from moltis-web; a missing CSS asset compile error in moltis-web is unrelated to CRM crate health.
The list endpoint with no params returns all contacts unbounded — a pre-existing behavior, not introduced by this PR.

code.finding: RPC handler registrations for crm.contacts.* live here
CRM service trait definition lives here
Method routing mod that composes all service handlers

workflow: The plan-ceo-review skill orchestrates reading CLAUDE.md, diffing against main, running tests, then posting a structured Linear comment.
Linear API access in headless sessions requires the key to be available as an env var — it was not available via MCP context but was accessible via direct Bash, requiring a fallback approach.
Writing the review to a local file first (plans/) before posting to Linear provides a durable artifact even if the API call fails.

friction: Linear API key was expired/invalid when accessed through MCP context tool, requiring a fallback to direct Bash curl to authenticate.
The env var for the Linear token was not available in the MCP sandbox environment, necessitating multiple auth strategies before finding one that worked.
moltis-web compile error (missing CSS asset) caused initial compile check noise unrelated to the PR under review.
open_items: Unbounded list fallback: crm.contacts.list with no params returns all contacts — accepted as pre-existing, to be fixed later with pagination enforcement.
No response envelope on paginated results: bare array returned with no total/hasMore fields — coordinate envelope change across all CRM endpoints in a future pass.
